summary: Top/bottom split opening divider text reveal component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-split-reveal/src/TitleSplitReveal.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleSplitReveal` and `titleSplitRevealDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleSplitReveal` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Split Reveal Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-split-reveal to my project. Preserve the exported TitleSplitRevealProps API and register the TitleSplitReveal composition with the default props.
